business_ideas.idea: Tariff mitigation services for e-commerce manufacturers sourcing alternatives.
Hampton Events multi-city expansion replicating Medieval Times model.
Delivery logistics optimization using on-ground 'drop zone' staffing.

predictions.text: Tariffs will force manufacturing reshoring to Vietnam/India rather than returning to US.
E-commerce margins will compress 25-30% from tariff costs, eliminating many small retailers.
Medieval Times-style dinner theaters will remain niche but highly profitable format (20M+ per location).
